headline: State Street (STT) Lands Treasury Default ETF Role And Launches Stablecoin Fund
summary: State Street's SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) has been chosen by the U.S. Department of the Treasury as the exclusive default ETF for Trump Accounts, a new national savings program for children launching July 4, 2026. State Street (NYSE:STT) also introduced a Stablecoin Reserves Money Market Fund aligned with new regulatory initiatives around digital assets. State Street, through its SPDR ETF platform, is a major provider of index products used by both individual and institutional...
